Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers

Class PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.SwingWorker<Void,Void>
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Future<Void>, RunnableFuture<Void>
public class PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker extends SwingWorker<Void,Void>
SwingWorker applying a median filter using ImageJ's RankFilters on a whole ImageStack.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class javax.swing.SwingWorker

    Applies the median filter to every slice of the ImageStack using ImageJ's RankFilters.MEDIAN rank filter.

  • Field Details

    • medianFilterEnabled

      private boolean medianFilterEnabled
      Whether the median filter is enabled. If false, the worker does nothing.

    • radius

      private double radius
      The median filter radius in pixels.

    • stack

      private ij.ImageStack stack
      The image stack to process, slice by slice.

  • Constructor Details

    • PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker

      public PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker(boolean medianFilterEnabled, double radius, ij.ImageStack stack)
      Creates a PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker.
      Parameters:
      medianFilterEnabled - Indicates if the median filter is enabled.
      radius - The median filter radius (px).
      stack - The array of images to process (slices).

  • Method Details

    • doInBackground

      protected Void doInBackground() throws Exception
      Applies the median filter to every slice of the ImageStack using ImageJ's RankFilters.MEDIAN rank filter.

      Cancellation is checked at the start and inside the slice loop, so the operation can be interrupted cleanly at any point.

      Specified by:
      doInBackground in class SwingWorker<Void,Void>
      Returns:
      null on completion or cancellation.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an unexpected error occurs during processing.
